title: Water Softeners
desc: We provide professional water softener installation and service for homes and businesses across the GTA. Hard water can cause scale buildup, reduce appliance lifespan, and affect water quality. Our team installs and maintains water softening systems that improve efficiency, protect your plumbing, and deliver cleaner, better-tasting water throughout your property.

#### Toronto Water Softeners 💧

One of the simplest and most cost-effective ways to achieve softer skin and healthier hair is by eliminating hard water in your home. A water softener not only enhances your daily comfort but also provides a range of additional benefits you’ll appreciate throughout your household.

## Hard Water and Your Home 💧

Noticing a white buildup on your taps or kettle? That’s hard water scale—a common issue across many areas, including Mississauga, Brampton, Georgetown, Oakville, and Vaughan.

​

This buildup comes from minerals in groundwater such as calcium, magnesium, and manganese. In your home, it can be difficult to remove, coats the inside of your plumbing, and often leaves your skin and hair feeling dry.

Learn more about how hard water impacts your home, comfort, and overall water quality.​

## Water Softener Solutions from Novo

01

### 485 HEDP Dual Pass Softening System\
Designed with dual tanks for consistent soft water, this system is ideal for homes with very hard water. The first tank removes most minerals, while the second ensures any remaining hardness is eliminated.

02

Econo Flo Water Softener\
A reliable and cost-effective option that uses up to 50% less salt and 28% less water than conventional systems. Available in compact and twin-tank designs, making it perfect for most households.

03

485 HE Softener, Filter & Specialty Systems\
Engineered for higher efficiency and greater flow rates, this line offers multiple models tailored for specific filtration and softening needs.

04

Advanced Filtration & Specialty Solutions\
Novo also provides specialized systems designed to target specific water concerns such as iron removal, odour control, and improved overall water quality—ideal for customized household needs.

## Water Testing Services 💧

While areas like Brampton and Mississauga commonly experience hard water, the best way to know for sure is with a professional test. Our team uses simple yet accurate field testing kits to assess your water quality during a home visit—giving you clear, reliable answers on the spot.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_8f2c6e5d8b0344468c28542e4a6ef031~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_231,h_232,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/824e75_8f2c6e5d8b0344468c28542e4a6ef031~mv2.png)
